---
title: "Acknowledgement of AI-Assisted Development"
---

This framework and this document were developed in active and 
sustained collaboration with AI tools throughout. Research synthesis, 
code scaffolding, schema drafting, iterative prototyping, artefact 
validation logic, and significant portions of the writing were produced 
through dialogue with AI assistants, principally Claude (Anthropic), 
ChatGPT (OpenAI), Grok, and Cursor AI, across the full duration of 
the research process.

This is acknowledged here not as a disclaimer but as a methodological 
fact with direct relevance to the framework's own argument. The 
framework argues that any output entering an analytical comparison 
chain must be schema-conforming, provenance-carrying, and 
validation-gated, regardless of whether it was produced by a 
deterministic optimiser, a stochastic simulation, or an AI-assisted 
development process. This document's own production is subject to the 
same governance logic it prescribes. Without governance, AI-assisted 
analytical work is opaque. With it, it is traceable. This document is 
designed to make that boundary visible.

Readers who are themselves using AI tools to engage with this framework 
are doing something it explicitly anticipates and accommodates. This 
document is designed to be an evolving, AI-readable, progressively 
extensible knowledge environment. This is its current state. Future 
states will be richer. The architecture is designed to absorb that 
enrichment without losing coherence.
